vlm_note: Localized from the REPAIRED post-setup frame. The fail-closed router now bounds the opening window on the noun-less built_any event, so the frame is a clean 8-piece opening board (4 settlements + 4 roads, no cities/buildout, both players 0 dev cards) instead of the 'Well Played!' end-game overlay. Hex ids read against the board CV's own layout (row1 h7=WOOD5 h8=SHEEP2 h9=WOOD6; row2 h18=WHEAT8 h1=SHEEP10 h2=ORE9 h10=WHEAT3; row3 h17=BRICK4 h6=WHEAT3 h0=WOOD11 h3=ORE4 h11=BRICK8; row4 h16=WHEAT11 h5=SHEEP6 h4=ORE5 h12=SHEEP10; row5 h15=WOOD12 h14=BRICK9 h13=DESERT). Colours per meta: ThePhantom=BLACK, pokeball=RED. Independent check: ThePhantom's grant multiset {ORE,SHEEP,WOOD} equals exactly the adjacent resources of settlement {8,9,2} (SHEEP2+WOOD6+ORE9) and of no other of its settlements — the glyph anchor corroborates this localization.
